## Problem statement

What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected?

## Proposed solution

Describe the solution you would like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you considered.

## Use case

Share a concrete example of how this would be used.

## Scope and impact

What parts of the project might this affect (CLI, runtime, docs, tooling, etc.)?

## Additional context

Add any other context, links, mockups, or references here.
